name_en: Square gold buckle top-tier original leather, Saint Laurent & SLP boutique latest version. Market exclusive, decorated with interlocking metal YSL logo. Flawless hardware, original ball grain, amazing texture, exquisite craftsmanship. Shoulder, handbag, or crossbody. Perfect as you imagine. Dimensions 31×22×7.5, Model 369610
